mnemonics.title: Shared Responsibility
mnemonics.content: Provider = Building Security, Tenant = Apartment Locks

acronyms.usage: Cloud traffic monitoring and policy enforcement

visualTips.visualization: Imagine airport security - verify ID at every checkpoint
Bouncer checking IDs at club entrance for each visitor

analogies.analogy: Like a diplomatic pouch - sealed container with specific recipients
Neighborhood gate vs individual house locks (subnet vs instance security)
